hero.title: Create legally-sound contracts in 2 minutes
hero.subtitle: Generate, preview, and share legal documents instantly. No signup required to start - see the value before you commit.

walkthrough.subtitle: How It Works
walkthrough.title: Visual 3 - Step Walkthrough
walkthrough.description: Creating a legal contract with Snaplegal is simple and stress-free. Just follow three quick steps — answer guided question

0.title: Answer the Guided Questions Carefully
0.description: Simply choose a template and respond to clear, step-by-step prompts. No legal jargon, just plain language.

1.title: Preview draft + plain-English summary.
1.description: See your contract instantly in a split view — full legal draft on one side, easy-to-read summary on the other.

2.title: Sign Digitally to Finalize Your Agreement
2.description: When you're ready, e-sign securely and store or share your contract with confidence.

templates.subtitle: Choose Templates
templates.title: Popular Templates
templates.description: Get started faster with our most used templates, from NDAs and freelance agreements to leases and service contracts. Each template is customizable and comes with a plain-English summary so you always know exactly what you're signing.

pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.title: Pricing Plan (MVP version)
pricing.description: Choose a plan that fits your needs — whether you're creating a few contracts, managing multiple agreements, or collaborating as a team. Simple, transparent pricing with no hidden fees

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Ideal for those requiring essential contracts.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Ideal for professionals and small businesses

team.name: Team
team.description: Tailored for teams seeking unlimited flexibility.

testimonials.subtitle: Testimonial
testimonials.title: What they say after using our product
testimonials.description: Trusted by freelancers, entrepreneurs, and small teams, SnapLegal makes contract creation simple, fast, and reliable. Here's what our users have to say.

testimonials.text: SnapLegal saved me hours. I created an NDA in minutes and felt confident with the plain-English summary.
As a small business owner, I love how simple it is. The Pro plan's multi-party signing is a game changer.
The contract templates are comprehensive and easy to customize. Perfect for my consulting business.
SnapLegal made contract creation so much easier. The e-signature feature saves me tons of time.

statistics.subtitle: Our Impact
statistics.title: Trusted by Thousands
statistics.description: Join thousands of users who trust SnapLegal for their contract needs.

cta.title: Start your contract today
cta.description: Simple, fast, and secure. Create legal contracts in minutes with guided steps and plain-English summaries

hero.title: Your Strategic Partner for Simple, Secure Contracts
hero.description: SnapLegal was built to make legal contracts accessible to everyone — freelancers, entrepreneurs, and small teams. Our platform combines ready-to-use templates, AI-powered assistance, and secure digital signing to save you time and remove complexity. We're committed to helping individuals and businesses create, understand, and manage agreements with confidence.

ourStory.subtitle: About Snaplegal
ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: With a clear focus on simplicity and trust, SnapLegal helps individuals and small businesses create professional contracts without the usual complexity or cost. By combining AI-powered guidance, plain-English summaries, and secure e-signatures, we ensure every agreement is fast, clear, and reliable.
ourStory.paragraph1: Snaplegal is dedicated to making contract creation easy and trustworthy for individuals and small businesses. Our platform leverages AI to provide straightforward guidance, clear summaries, and secure electronic signatures, ensuring that every agreement is quick, transparent, and dependable.
ourStory.paragraph2: At SnapLegal, we prioritize simplicity and reliability, enabling individuals and small businesses to draft professional contracts effortlessly. Our innovative use of AI, combined with easy-to-understand summaries and safe e-signatures, guarantees that every contract is processed swiftly and clearly.

items.q: How do I sign up for Lynco?
items.a: You can create your account directly on our website. Once subscribed, simply log in to the mobile app to start managing your business.
Plans start at R$497/month for the Autonomous Plan and R$997/month for the Multiprofessional Plan. See the pricing section above for included features.
Lynco helps you collect payments through integrated flows on WhatsApp and the POS, with reconciliation aligned to your operation.

items.q: What happens if a payment fails?
items.a: Failed payments can be retried or followed up automatically depending on your configuration, so you can recover revenue without manual chasing.

hero.title: How to Link Your Credit Card to Your WhatsApp
hero.description: Make sure your WhatsApp Business account is ready to send messages, templates, and campaigns by linking a valid payment card in Meta Business Manager.

requirements.title: Meta Business Verification
requirements.description: The business must complete Meta Business Verification. Completing verification increases the daily messaging limit and allows the business to scale message delivery to more customers.

whyImportant.title: Why This Is
whyImportant.description: Before you can send WhatsApp campaigns or approved message templates, you need to add a payment method (credit card) to your Meta Business account. Meta charges for message delivery while Lynco charges for campaign tools

step1.title: Access Meta Business Suite & Go to Payment Settings
step1.description: Go to your FB management page at:

step2.title: Add a Payment Method
step2.description: Click Add Payment Method to link a credit or debit card that Meta will use for WhatsApp message charges.
step2.note: This card is used only for Meta billing.

step3.title: Enter Card Details
step3.description: Enter your card information, billing address, and confirm the details.

step4.title: Payment Method Confirmed
step4.description: Once saved, your card will appear in your billing settings and WhatsApp messaging will be activated.

allSet.title: You're All Set
allSet.message: Your account is ready, and your subscription is now active.
allSet.trustDescription: Lynco does not resell WhatsApp messages. Meta controls all WhatsApp delivery fees directly.

hero.title: How to Link Your WhatsApp
hero.description: Connect your WhatsApp Business account to start sending campaigns, automations, and notifications via WhatsApp.

whyImportant.title: Why This Is
whyImportant.descriptionSuffix: Your messages, data, and billing are managed directly by Meta for maximum security.

step1.title: Access Meta Business Suite & Add WhatsApp Business
step1.description: Go to your FB management page and add your WhatsApp Business account.

step2.title: Link Your WhatsApp Business Account
step2.description: Securely link your WhatsApp Business account through Meta so Lynco can manage your campaigns.

step3.title: Confirm WhatsApp Business Number
step3.description: Enter the phone number associated with your WhatsApp Business account to finalize the synchronization.

allSet.title: You're All Set
allSet.message: Your WhatsApp Business account is now connected.
allSet.trustDescription: Lynco does not resell WhatsApp messages. Meta controls all WhatsApp delivery fees directly.

hero.title: Link Your WhatsApp Business Account to
hero.description: Follow this 14-step guide to securely authenticate and pair your WhatsApp Business account with the Lynco platform via Meta.

requirements.title: WhatsApp Business App Version
requirements.description: The business customer must be using WhatsApp Business App version 2.24.17 or later on their mobile device.

step1.title: Start WhatsApp Business Connection
step1.description: Link your WhatsApp Business account to manage customer conversations directly from Lynco.

step2.title: Redirecting to Meta
step2.description: Please wait while we establish a secure connection with Meta (Facebook) servers.

step3.title: Continue with Facebook
step3.description: Log in using the Facebook account linked to your WhatsApp Business.

step4.title: Securely connect your account
step4.description: Lynco will receive access to your WhatsApp Business account to enable messaging features.

step5.title: Choose WhatsApp Business Account
step5.description: Choose the WhatsApp Business account you want to connect to Lynco.

step7.title: Enter your WhatsApp Business number
step7.description: Please make sure this number is associated with the business profile you selected in the previous step.

step6.title: Select the ‘Existing WhatsApp’ option
step6.description: Make sure your account is at least 7 days old.

step8.title: Connect to the Business Platform
step8.description: Please check the business WhatsApp. You should have received a message from Facebook Business.

step9.title: Connect to the Business Platform
step9.description: Please click 'Connect to the Business Platform' to continue.

step10.title: Share Chat History
step10.description: Selecting any option will not affect anything in our app.

step11.title: Scan QR Code or Enter the Access Code
step11.description: Open WhatsApp Business on your phone and scan this QR code to complete the setup. or enter access code

step12.title: Confirm WhatsApp Connection
step12.description: Review and confirm your WhatsApp Business details to finalize the setup.

step13.title: Review
step13.description: Review and confirm your WhatsApp Business details to finalize the setup.

step14.title: You're All Set!
step14.description: Your account is now linked! You can now manage all your WhatsApp chats directly from Lynco.

hero.title: How can we help?
hero.subtitle: Find quick answers or contact our team directly.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.subtitle: Choose the most convenient channel for you.

email.label: Email
email.title: suporte@lynco.com.br
email.description: Response within 1 business day for technical/account issues.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the platform.
faq.noResults: No questions found. Contact us via WhatsApp or email.
questions: How do I connect my WhatsApp to Lynco?
Does Lynco work with my personal WhatsApp?
How do I cancel my subscription?
Can I change my plan at any time?
How do I send reactivation campaigns?
How can I receive advance payments from customers?
Are my data and my customers' data secure?
I forgot my password. How do I recover it?
Does the platform work for any type of business?
answers: After creating your account and activating your subscription, go to Settings in the platform and follow the step-by-step WhatsApp Business API integration. You’ll need a dedicated business phone number (it can’t be a number already linked to personal WhatsApp).
No. Lynco uses the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta), which requires an exclusive business number. A personal number can’t be used simultaneously with the API.

You can cancel at any time directly in Settings > Subscription in the platform, or by emailing suporte@lynco.com.br. Access remains active until the end of the paid period and there is no proportional refund.
Yes. Contact support via WhatsApp or email and we’ll migrate your plan. Prorated billing will be adjusted in the next cycle.

Lynco’s AI chats with your customer on WhatsApp, understands the requested service and checks your schedule availability. The booking is confirmed automatically and reminders are sent before the appointment.
Go to Campaigns in the dashboard, select the customer list, choose a Meta-approved message template, and schedule sending. Note: WhatsApp campaign sending may incur additional Meta fees.
Lynco integrates with Pagar.me to generate and send payment links via WhatsApp during scheduling. To enable it, go to Settings > Payments and connect your account.
Yes. We use encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, role-based access control, and continuous security monitoring. We process data in accordance with LGPD.
On the login screen, click “Forgot password” and enter your registered email. You’ll receive a reset link within minutes. If you don’t, check spam or contact suporte@lynco.com.br.
Lynco is built for service businesses with appointments, such as clinics, salons, studios, freelancers, and other service providers. If you’re unsure, talk to us on WhatsApp.

banner.title: Still have questions?
banner.subtitle: Our team replies in minutes on WhatsApp.

privacyHtml.title: Privacy Policy
privacyHtml.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data, in compliance with the LGPD.

who.title: Who we are
paragraphs: LYNCO TECHNOLOGIES LTDA (CNPJ: 62.624.475/0001-06) is a technology company that develops and operates the Lynco platform, a SaaS (Software as a Service) solution focused on automating WhatsApp customer support for service businesses.

Lynco acts as an intelligent digital assistant, operating on behalf of contracting businesses through natural language, integrated with the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta). Its services include scheduling, automated reminders, reactivation campaigns, and collection of advance payments.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.intro: For the purposes of this Policy, the following definitions apply under the LGPD (Law No. 13,709/2018):

items.desc: Any information related to an identified or identifiable natural person.
The natural person to whom the personal data relates.
A natural or legal person who makes decisions regarding data processing. For Users’ data, LYNCO TECHNOLOGIES LTDA.
A natural or legal person who processes data on behalf of the controller.
A company or professional who contracts and uses the Lynco platform.
A natural person served via WhatsApp by Lynco’s automated system on behalf of the User.
Responsible for the communication channel between the controller, data subjects, and the ANPD.
Any operation performed on personal data: collection, use, access, storage, deletion, communication, among others.

data.title: Data collected
data.userDataIntro: When creating an account and using the Lynco platform, we collect:
userDataList: Billing and subscription data (processed via Pagar.me)
Platform usage and navigation data (access logs, features used)
data.finalCustomerTitle: 3.2 End Customer data (processed on behalf of the User)
data.finalCustomerIntro: As part of platform operations, Lynco processes, on behalf of Users, their end customers’ data, including:
finalCustomerList: Message content exchanged with the automated system
Advance payment data (when applicable, processed via Pagar.me)
data.importantNote: Important: For end customer data, Lynco acts as a processor and the User is the controller responsible for the legal basis and the relationship with their own customers.

purposes.title: Purposes and legal bases for processing
purposes.intro: Lynco processes data for the following purposes and legal bases (art. 7 of the LGPD):
tableRows: Legitimate interest / Performance of contract (art. 7, V and IX)

sharing.title: Sharing with third parties
sharing.intro: Lynco does not sell personal data. Sharing occurs exclusively with partners essential to platform operations:
tableRows: Sending and receiving messages via WhatsApp, under Meta’s Business API Terms of Service.
Processing subscription payments and sending billing links on behalf of Users.
Sending push notifications to platform users.
Storage and processing of data on secure third-party servers (cloud providers).
sharing.footer: All partners are contractually required to process personal data in compliance with the LGPD and other applicable laws.

retention.title: Retention and disposal of data
retention.intro: Personal data is retained for the period necessary for the purposes described in this Policy:
tableRows: Term of the contract + 5 years (legal and tax obligations)
6 months (Brazilian Internet Civil Rights Framework – Law No. 12,965/2014)
As required by applicable tax and financial law
retention.footer: After the retention period ends, data is securely deleted or anonymized, except where legal retention is required.

rights.title: Data subject rights
rights.intro: Under articles 17 to 22 of the LGPD, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
list: Confirmation that your personal data is processed
Access to the personal data processed
Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
Anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary data or data processed in violation of the LGPD
Portability of data to another provider, upon request
Deletion of data processed based on consent
Information about entities with whom Lynco shared your data
Withdrawal of consent at any time
Objection to processing based on legitimate interest
rights.infoCard: To exercise your rights, send a request to privacidade@lynco.com.br. The response deadline is up to 15 calendar days.

security.title: Information security
security.intro: Lynco adopts technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, destruction, loss, or any improper processing:
list: Encryption of passwords and sensitive data in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256)
security.footer: In the event of a security incident that may create relevant risk to data subjects, Lynco will notify the ANPD and affected data subjects within up to 72 hours after becoming aware of the incident.

cookies.title: Cookies and tracking technologies
cookies.intro: Lynco’s web platform may use cookies and similar technologies to:
cookies.footer: You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies may impair platform functionality.

transfer.title: International transfers of data
paragraphs: Use of the WhatsApp Business API (Meta) and other third-party services may involve transferring personal data to servers located outside Brazil.

Such transfers are performed in accordance with art. 33 of the LGPD, ensuring that recipient countries or organizations provide a level of personal data protection adequate to that provided under Brazilian law, through compliance instruments made available by international partners.

minors.title: Minors
paragraphs: The Lynco platform is intended exclusively for professionals and companies. We do not intentionally collect personal data from individuals under 18 years of age.
If we identify improper processing of minors’ data, we will take the necessary steps to delete such data from our databases.

changes.title: Changes to this Policy
paragraphs: This Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in legislation, our services, or privacy practices.

Relevant changes will be communicated to the User by email or in-app notification at least 15 days prior to taking effect. Continued use of the platform after notification implies acceptance of the updated version.

contact.title: Contact and Data Protection Officer (DPO)
contact.intro: Questions, requests to exercise rights, or communications related to this Policy should be sent to the Data Processing Officer (DPO):

cards.addressValue:
Av. Paulista, 1636, Conj. 1504
Bela Vista – São Paulo/SP
CEP 01320-200
cards.anpdSuffix: — if your request is not adequately addressed.

privacyPrelaunch.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPrelaunch.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

meta.controllingCompany: Controlling company: Lynco Technologies Ltda — CNPJ 62.624.475/0001-06
meta.address: Address: Rua 1822, nº 400, sala 902 Box 02, Centro, Balneário Camboriú – SC, CEP 88330-484

scope.title: Scope (pre-launch)
scope.body: Before the app's public launch, we only collected data necessary for:
bullets: Contact information and interest (e.g., name, email) submitted through the website form;
Prior communications regarding the product (waitlist, news and test invitations);
Minimum technical data for website navigation (logs and essential cookies/analytics, if enabled).
scope.footer: We do not collect sensitive data or process financial transactions on the site at this stage.

dataCollect.title: Data we collect
bullets: Provided by you: name, email, company (if specified), and message content.
Automatically generated: IP address, date/time, user-agent, pages visited, basic browsing events.
Cookies and similar technologies: only those strictly necessary for the website to function. Optionally, analytics and ad/remarketing cookies only with your consent via banner (when enabled).

purposes.title: Purposes and legal basis (LGPD)
bullets: Handling contacts and commercial interest (art. 7, V – execution of preliminary procedures; and art. 7, IX – legitimate interest, with balancing test).
Sending communications about the product (art. 7, I – consent; you can revoke it at any time).
Security and fraud prevention (Article 7, IX – legitimate interest).

sharing.title: Sharing
bullets: Hosting and infrastructure, email/CRM, analytics, and domain verification tools (e.g., Metadomain verification).
sharing.footer: Everyone works under contract and only according to our instructions. We do not sell data.

internationalTransfers.title: International Transfers
internationalTransfers.body: Service providers may be located outside of Brazil. In these cases, we adopt appropriate safeguards (contractual and organizational) as stipulated in the LGPD (Brazilian General Data Protection Law).

retention.title: Retention
bullets: Contact/waitlist: until withdrawal of consent or 24 months after the last useful contact, whichever occurs first.
Access logs: in accordance with legal retention periods.

rights.title: Your rights (data subject)
rights.body: Access, correction, portability, anonymization, blocking, deletion, information about sharing, objection and revocation of consent.

cookies.title: Cookies and tracking preferences
cookies.body: When analytics/ads are active, we will display a consent banner allowing you to accept/reject categories. You can change this at any time via the "Cookie Preferences" link in the footer (when available).

children.title: Children and adolescents
children.body: This website is not intended for minors. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

security.title: Security
security.body: Proportionate technical and organizational controls (encryption in transit, access restriction, logging and auditing). No system is 100% inviolable.

contact.title: Contact and complaints
bullets: ANPD: as per official channels of the National Data Protection Authority.
Consumer: Contact consumer protection agencies and pursue appropriate legal action.

updates.title: Updates to this Policy
updates.body: We will publish updated versions on this page and indicate the date of last modification. Material changes may require new consent.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms that apply to the Lynco pre-launch website.

scope.title: Scope (pre-launch)
scope.body: This website is for institutional purposes and serves to introduce Lynco and collect interest (waitlist). The SaaS has not yet been launched to the public; there is no contracting or payment through the website at this stage.

content.title: Website content
content.body: Informative content may be updated without prior notice. Third-party links have their own policies; Lynco is not responsible for external content.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.body: Trademarks, logos, trade names, layouts and other assets displayed belong to Lynco Technologies Ltda or its licensors. Copying, modifying, distributing or reverse engineering is not permitted.

bullets.unauthorized: Not attempt unauthorized access to restricted areas.

noOffer.title: Lack of offer/contract
noOffer.body: During the pre-launch period, there are no sales or subscriptions via the website. Plans, prices, and service agreements will be presented after the launch, in a dedicated environment.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: The website is provided "as is". Lynco is not responsible for: temporary unavailability, errors caused by third parties (providers, internet), or indirect losses/expectations of results. This does not exclude consumer rights where applicable.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Use of this website is subject to the Privacy Policy (an integral part of these Terms). Where required, we will collect cookie/analytics consent.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may change these Terms at any time. The date of the last update will be indicated on this page.

official.title: Official communication
official.body: contato@lynco.com.br is the official channel. Messages via social media do not constitute formal customer service.

jurisdiction.title: Legislation and jurisdiction
jurisdiction.body: Governed by the laws of Brazil. Jurisdiction of Balneário Camboriú/SC, unless the consumer has the right to choose their domicile.

who.title: Who we are
who.body: Lynco Technologies Ltda (CNPJ: 62.624.475/0001-06) develops and operates the Lynco platform, a SaaS solution for automating WhatsApp service interactions for service businesses.

data.title: Data collected
data.body: We process data to provide and improve the platform. Depending on your use, we may collect:

bullets.account: Account data (name, email, phone, business name);
bullets.usage: Usage and navigation data (logs, accessed features);
bullets.whatsapp: WhatsApp interaction data handled for users (messages and scheduling information);
bullets.payments: Billing and payment data processed by payment providers (when applicable).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. We may share data with essential partners (e.g., WhatsApp/Meta, payment processors, notification providers, cloud infrastructure) to operate the services, under contractual and legal safeguards.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may request confirmation, access, correction, portability, deletion (when applicable), and other rights provided by LGPD. Requests can be made using the contact below.

security.title: Security
security.body: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or improper processing.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related requests and questions, contact our privacy channel.
